5.1% · dead stock, near-zero return

$739K is working — turning at or above target. But $44K sits trapped in dead stock earning nothing, and 6 SKUs will stock out before a reorder can land. The capital is healthy; the edges are not.

M
Operations AI · Inventory
Live3 signalsSynced just now
Stockout risk
6 SKUs below the lead-time line
Wireless Charger and Cylinder Vase are already out; cable, screen protector, pillow and diffuser have less runway than their lead time. $158K of revenue is exposed before any reorder can land.
Cost trend
Earbud landed cost up 6.4%
Supplier raised the unit price and freight rose with it — landed moved $401 → $427 since the last receipt. CM3 on this line slipped 3 points. Re-check the price before the next PO.
Dead stock
$44K frozen at zero return
Bamboo Cutlery (380 units) and Enamel Mug (290) haven't moved in 90 days — 950 and 480 days of cover. Liquidate to recover ~$31K and free the shelf.
Item ledger — needs attention & healthy

Stocked SKUs18
Inventory value$869K
Trapped capital$44K
MConsole note
Read
20 SKUs holding $869K at landed cost — about 24% of net capital. 2 out of stock, 4 low, and $44K trapped in two dead lines turning at near-zero velocity.
Exposure
6 SKUs carry runway shorter than their lead time — $158K of revenue is exposed before a reorder can physically land. These are structural stockouts, not restock reminders: shelf count is not the trigger, lead time is.
Directive
Reorder the 6 structural-stockout SKUs now. Liquidate Bamboo Cutlery and Enamel Mug to recover ~$31K of frozen capital. Hold the healthy turners — their cover is deep; buying more only moves cash into stock you don't need yet.
Ask Magellan anything…
